short_summary: Iran deal uncertain; Ukraine strikes Russian energy
rationale: For Ukraine, the Iran deal timing dispute prolongs uncertainty about US strategic focus, while Ukraine's own strike on a Russian sea terminal is a notable operational development in the ongoing war.

top_events.title: Ukraine to keep targeting Russian energy after hitting sea terminal
top_events.summary: Ukraine's strike on a Russian sea energy terminal and declared intent to continue targeting Russian energy infrastructure is a significant operational development directly relevant to Ukrainian war strategy.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran casts doubt on timing
top_events.summary: Iran's contradiction of Trump's Sunday signing claim slightly reduces the immediate risk of US attention being fully diverted from Ukraine, but the deal remains imminent and the strategic pivot continues.

top_events.title: Gaza post-'ceasefire' deaths hit 983 as Israeli attack targets refugee camp
top_events.summary: Continued Gaza conflict keeps global attention and Western political capital divided, indirectly reducing pressure on Russia and Western focus on Ukraine's needs.
